name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new module
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What need does this address? Link the relevant spec in `docs/` if there is one.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Surface**
- [ ] Owner app (Flutter)
- [ ] Dashboard (React)
- [ ] Backend / Edge Function / SQL

**Guardrails to respect**
Decision-support-not-diagnosis · RLS not weakened · tokens for color · media supplementary only.
